fields.message: Client verified OTP and confirmed termination for invoice INV99.

fields.name: Invoice Generated
fields.subject: Invoice Payment Link from Square Brothers - {{ invoice_id }}
fields.body:
Hi {{ client_name }},

An Invoice has been generated and is due for payment by {{ due_date }}.

Invoiced Items:
===============

{{ plan }} - {{ domain }}

You can conveniently make your payment using:
https://www.squarebrothers.com/payment-methods/

Invoice Number: {{ invoice_id }}
Invoice Amount: {{ amount }}

Alternatively, login at:
https://manage.squarebrothers.com/

If you need help, call: 044-4000-9000

After payment, reply with transaction details.

Thank you for choosing Square Brothers!

fields.name: Due Tomorrow
fields.subject: Due Date Reminder - {{ domain }}

fields.name: Due Today
fields.subject: Due Today - {{ domain }}

fields.name: Suspension
fields.subject: Suspension Notice - {{ domain }}
fields.body:
Dear Customer,

Your account has been suspended due to non-payment.

Invoice Number: {{ invoice_id }}
Amount: Rs. {{ amount }}

If payment is not made within 48 hours, your account will be permanently deleted.

Pay now:
https://www.squarebrothers.com/payment-methods/

fields.name: Confirmation
fields.subject: Confirm Renewal - {{ domain }}
fields.body:
Dear Customer,

Please confirm whether you want to renew {{ service }} for:

{{ domain }} ({{ plan }})

If not, we will proceed with account removal.

fields.name: Queue (Termination Queue)
fields.subject: Account Queued for Termination - {{ domain }}
fields.body:
Hi {{ client_name }},

No update received for renewal of:

{{ domain }} ({{ plan }})

Your account is now queued for removal.

All data will be permanently deleted.

Confirm if you want to retain the account.

fields.name: Final Termination
fields.subject: Termination Notice - {{ domain }}

fields.name: Suspension 2
fields.subject: Subject {{ domain }} for {{ plan }} from SB
